Bash("D:\\ARCHER_9\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import os
os.chdir\(''D:/ARCHER_9''\)

from archer.config import get_config
config = get_config\(\)
print\(f''Config loaded. SOUL dir: {config.soul_dir}''\)

from archer.memory.sqlite_store import get_sqlite_store
store = get_sqlite_store\(\)
print\(f''SQLite store OK at {config.sqlite_db_path}''\)

from archer.agents.orchestrator import AgentOrchestrator
orch = AgentOrchestrator\(\)
print\(f''Orchestrator OK''\)
print\(f''Session ID: {orch.session_id[:8]}...''\)
print\(f''Active agent: {orch.active_agent}''\)
print\(f''Loaded souls: {list\(orch._souls.keys\(\)\)}''\)

# Test routing
tests = [
    ''What time is it?'',
    ''I just ate a huge burger for lunch'',
    ''I am feeling really stressed out lately'',
    ''Can you remind me to call mom?'',
    ''I need a good workout routine'',
    ''I had a fight with my partner'',
]
for t in tests:
    agent = orch._classify_agent\(t\)
    print\(f''  ""{t}"" -> {agent}''\)

print\(''All routing tests passed!''\)
")

Bash(D:ARCHER_9.venvScriptspython.exe -c "
import cv2
print\(''Scanning camera devices...''\)
for i in range\(5\):
    cap = cv2.VideoCapture\(i, cv2.CAP_DSHOW\)
    if cap.isOpened\(\):
        ret, frame = cap.read\(\)
        w = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH\)\)
        h = int\(cap.get\(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT\)\)
        backend = cap.getBackendName\(\)
        print\(f''  Device {i}: OPEN  \({w}x{h}, backend={backend}, read={ret}\)''\)
        cap.release\(\)
    else:
        print\(f''  Device {i}: not available''\)
")
